title: Holt (disambiguation)
content:
'''Holt''' can refer to:

==[[Canon|''Star Wars'' Canon]]==
*[[Sian Holt]], a high-end [[Private investigator|private]] [[detective]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*The [[Holt family]], a military family from [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]].
**[[Bannidge Holt]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]]
**[[Arhul Holt]], Imperial admiral
**[[Holt (Fleet Admiral)|Holt]], an Imperial [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]]
*The [[Holt family (Republic Dark Age)|Holt family]], a family from [[Aquilaris Minor]].
**[[Aron Holt]], Skin Diver
**[[Mercia Holt]], [[Archaeology/Legends|Archaeologist]]
**[[Kerra Holt]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]
**[[Kerra Holt's sibling]]
*The [[Holt Cross]], an award on Anaxes
*[[Holt Kazed]], a [[Nelvaanian/Legends|Nelvaanian]] term
*[[Holt (captain)|Holt]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship captain
*[[Holt (Executor captain)|Holt]], an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] captain of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*[[Natalie Holt]], who composed the [[musical score]] to the [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'']] television series
*[[Virginia Holt]], who authored the books ''[[Fuzzy as an Ewok]]'' and ''[[Shiny as a Droid]]''
*[[Holt McCallany]], a real-world voice actor

{{Disambig}}
